note: Category labels of hidden scenarios the Builder MAY see (spec §3 Builder row, Ambiguity B). Labels only — never inputs, expected values, or asserts.

labels.label: malformed engplan/1 yields a safe categorized error, never a crash
events are append-only; never removed or reordered
only legal event-status transitions are accepted
path traversal / symlink escape on asset + write paths is rejected
SSE connection cap returns 503 beyond the limit
endpoints return the contract-declared status codes
internal errors return a generic error, no stack/source leak
